title: neillia uekii
intro: Neillia uekii, also known as Ukei or Kei-Kei, is a type of flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and discomfort, and promoting digestive health. Neillia uekii is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, with the dried flowers or leaves being steeped in hot water to release their active compounds.
